title: T-131 — PARITY: Pipeline views Playwright + axe parity (vs pipeline.jsx) NPD-f slice of T-060
prompt:
# T-131 — Pipeline views parity check

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.8, §17.12 + `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/pipeline.jsx:35-208 (Kanban + Table + Split)
Parent root: T-060

## Goal
Playwright screenshot parity + axe-violations check for all three pipeline view modes (Kanban, Table, Split) against the prototype. Validates tab switching, shared filter/sort state, and 0 critical/serious axe violations on each view.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/e2e/npd/pipeline-views-parity.spec.ts: seeds a small project fixture; visits /(npd)/pipeline?view=kanban — captures full-page screenshot — switches to ?view=table — captures — switches to ?view=split with ?selected=PRJ-1 — captures.
2. Each screenshot compared against the corresponding prototype snapshot region with the prototype-parity tolerance configured in repo Playwright config.
3. axe-core run on each view after mount; assert 0 critical and 0 serious violations.
4. Tab switching tested in-spec: switching does not full-reload, shared ?filter=mine persists across all three views.

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/npd/pipeline-views-parity.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/npd/fixtures/pipeline-views-seed.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the pipeline route renders all three view modes, when Playwright captures full-page screenshots, then each view matches the corresponding prototype region within the configured parity tolerance per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`
2. Given each view is mounted, when axe-core runs, then 0 critical and 0 serious violations are reported per the parity policy
3. Given a user toggles ?filter=mine and switches tabs, when each view renders, then the filter persists and the displayed project list matches across all three views

## Test strategy
- RED: pipeline-views-parity.spec.ts before T-130 wiring closes; ensures wiring keeps all three views in parity
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test:e2e pipeline-views-parity'

## Risk red lines
- Do not run against shared/staging DB — use isolated test container
- Do not relax tolerance to make tests pass
- Do not skip axe checks on any view
